name: cde-observability
title: Catalog Observability
description: CDE-authored dashboard, editable in Pentaho CDE — assets by source & sensitivity mix over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: AssetsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(d.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: SensitivityMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e.sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS sens, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_entity e ON s.entity_key=e.entity_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: GovBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*SUM(s.governed_entity_count)/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS gov_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
